issues.description: Effect prevents opponent Character from activating [Blocker], not grants it. Should use negative keyword logic or 'DisableKeyword' action, not 'GiveKeyword'.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' (effect lasts 'during this turn'), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text explicitly states 'during this turn' which is a [Your Turn] duration.
TrashFromHand uses 'thenActions' array but has no conditional logic; consider if this should be conditional (trash only if player chooses to proceed).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character and trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less cannot activate [Blocker] during this turn.
